content:
📜 Adjustments to Catharsis Threads

Instead of separate discussions, we now have a single “Catharsis” forum divided into:
1. 🌙 Night Thread (“Drama & Reflection”)
• Students discuss intellectual struggles, emotional reactions to literature, and personal connections.
• Prompts include:
• What’s a theme from this week’s readings that made you uncomfortable or reflective?
• What’s something from life that made you think about class discussions?
• Have you ever had a moment of uncertainty or fear like those explored in this week’s themes?
2. ☀ Day Thread (“Comedy & Play”)
• A lighthearted space for venting, humor, and literary satire.
• Prompts include:
• What’s a ridiculous pet peeve about books, movies, or storytelling?
• If you were forced to rewrite this week’s story as a comedy, what would change?
• What’s a meme, gif, or joke that sums up this week’s readings?

✅ Why This Works:
context: From document: Comprehensive Course Structure and Alternating Schedule (A & B Weeks… — chunk 45 (chunk 45/108)
